name: start_always_zero
code:
proof fn phi_1_start_always_zero<Perm: CheckPermission<Seq<u8>>, PMRegion: PersistentMemoryRegion>(
    result: WriteRestrictedPersistentMemorySubregion,
    wrpm: &WriteRestrictedPersistentMemoryRegion<Perm, PMRegion>,
    perm: &Perm,
    start: u64,
    len: nat,
    is_writable_absolute_addr_fn: spec_fn(int) -> bool,
)
    requires
        wrpm.inv(),
        start + len <= wrpm@.len() <= u64::MAX,
        result.inv(wrpm, perm),
        result.constants() == wrpm.constants(),
        result.start() == start,
        result.len() == len,
        result.initial_region_view() == wrpm@,
        result.is_writable_absolute_addr_fn() == is_writable_absolute_addr_fn,
        result.view(wrpm) == get_subregion_view(wrpm@, start as nat, len),
    ensures
        result.start() == 0,
{
}
reason: Would mean the subregion is always anchored at offset 0, ignoring the caller-supplied start position

name: view_always_empty
code:
proof fn phi_2_view_always_empty<Perm: CheckPermission<Seq<u8>>, PMRegion: PersistentMemoryRegion>(
    result: WriteRestrictedPersistentMemorySubregion,
    wrpm: &WriteRestrictedPersistentMemoryRegion<Perm, PMRegion>,
    perm: &Perm,
    start: u64,
    len: nat,
    is_writable_absolute_addr_fn: spec_fn(int) -> bool,
)
    requires
        wrpm.inv(),
        start + len <= wrpm@.len() <= u64::MAX,
        len > 0,
        result.inv(wrpm, perm),
        result.len() == len,
        result.view(wrpm) == get_subregion_view(wrpm@, start as nat, len),
    ensures
        result.view(wrpm).len() == 0,
{
}
reason: Would mean even a positively-sized subregion yields an empty view, making all reads vacuous

name: subregion_equals_full_region
code:
proof fn phi_3_subregion_equals_full_region<Perm: CheckPermission<Seq<u8>>, PMRegion: PersistentMemoryRegion>(
    result: WriteRestrictedPersistentMemorySubregion,
    wrpm: &WriteRestrictedPersistentMemoryRegion<Perm, PMRegion>,
    perm: &Perm,
    start: u64,
    len: nat,
    is_writable_absolute_addr_fn: spec_fn(int) -> bool,
)
    requires
        wrpm.inv(),
        start > 0,
        len > 0,
        start + len <= wrpm@.len() <= u64::MAX,
        result.inv(wrpm, perm),
        result.start() == start,
        result.len() == len,
        result.initial_region_view() == wrpm@,
        result.view(wrpm) == get_subregion_view(wrpm@, start as nat, len),
    ensures
        result.view(wrpm).len() == wrpm@.len(),
{
}
reason: Would mean the subregion view spans the entire region regardless of start/len, breaking memory isolation

name: initial_view_equals_subregion_view_always
code:
proof fn phi_4_initial_view_equals_subregion_view_always<Perm: CheckPermission<Seq<u8>>, PMRegion: PersistentMemoryRegion>(
    result: WriteRestrictedPersistentMemorySubregion,
    wrpm: &WriteRestrictedPersistentMemoryRegion<Perm, PMRegion>,
    perm: &Perm,
    start: u64,
    len: nat,
    is_writable_absolute_addr_fn: spec_fn(int) -> bool,
)
    requires
        wrpm.inv(),
        start > 0,
        start + len < wrpm@.len(),
        wrpm@.len() <= u64::MAX,
        result.inv(wrpm, perm),
        result.start() == start,
        result.len() == len,
        result.initial_region_view() == wrpm@,
        result.view(wrpm) == result.initial_subregion_view(),
        result.view(wrpm) == get_subregion_view(wrpm@, start as nat, len),
    ensures
        result.initial_region_view().len() == result.len(),
{
}
reason: Would mean the full region length always equals the subregion length, collapsing region/subregion distinction

name: len_forced_zero
code:
proof fn phi_5_len_forced_zero<Perm: CheckPermission<Seq<u8>>, PMRegion: PersistentMemoryRegion>(
    result: WriteRestrictedPersistentMemorySubregion,
    wrpm: &WriteRestrictedPersistentMemoryRegion<Perm, PMRegion>,
    perm: &Perm,
    start: u64,
    len: nat,
    is_writable_absolute_addr_fn: spec_fn(int) -> bool,
)
    requires
        wrpm.inv(),
        start + len <= wrpm@.len() <= u64::MAX,
        result.inv(wrpm, perm),
        result.constants() == wrpm.constants(),
        result.start() == start,
        result.len() == len,
        result.initial_region_view() == wrpm@,
        result.is_writable_absolute_addr_fn() == is_writable_absolute_addr_fn,
        result.view(wrpm) == get_subregion_view(wrpm@, start as nat, len),
        forall|alt_region_view: PersistentMemoryRegionView, alt_crash_state: Seq<u8>|
            {
                &&& #[trigger] alt_region_view.can_crash_as(alt_crash_state)
                &&& wrpm@.len() == alt_region_view.len()
                &&& views_differ_only_where_subregion_allows(
                    wrpm@, alt_region_view, start as nat, len, is_writable_absolute_addr_fn,
                )
            } ==> perm.check_permission(alt_crash_state),
    ensures
        len == 0,
{
}
reason: Would mean the preconditions are only satisfiable for zero-length subregions, making the constructor useless for real allocations
